---
name: QuantRocket Integration Blueprint
about: Configure QuantRocket-ready Python/ML runtime and operational baseline checks.
---

## Goal
Create reproducible QuantRocket-capable environments for strategy workloads.

## Use this skill when
- You need QuantRocket client setup with ML ecosystem dependencies.
- You need baseline operational checks before strategy execution.

## Operational checklist
1. Install Python 3.11 environment dependencies.
2. Install quantrocket-client and core ML libraries.
3. Validate runtime and log versions/capacity for repeatability.
4. Store checkpoint metadata for reproducible reruns.
